description: To the casualty collection point in Temryuk, from there the next day by hospital ship on a 20-hour crossing to Kerch.
After crossing the Crimea, onto the train. Hives from the tetanus shot. Field hospitals are being cleared for the coming offensive — hopefully back to the Reich.
Arrives at the field hospital. Leg is healing, big bandage gone, only two plasters left. Table tennis in the courtyard.
Transferred by hospital train to Vinnytsia. As of recently, recovered patients are sent to the replacement battalion. Surely back to Chemnitz.
Quartered with the convalescent company at Die Krone, spends 13 Sundays at home. Recruited by an officer for the rocket troops (V2) as prime-mover driver.
